title: Moschosma dimidiatum
intro: Moschosma dimidiatum is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), commonly known as a type of wild mint or sweet mint. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Moschosma dimidiatum include volatile oils, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Moschosma dimidiatum is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote digestion.
